title: Matte White Vinyl Roll, 12inch x 5ft Permanent Vinyl, Self Adhesive Vinyl for Mug, Cup, Home Decor, Walls, Birthday, Christmas Gifts and DIY Projects (Matte white)
features: 【Size and Color】You will get 1 roll self adhesive matte white permanent vinyl, which is 12" x 5Ft/ 30.5 x 152.5cm. Perfect for home decor, windows, decals, mugs, photo frames, cars, Christmas cards, DIY crafting gifts and more, meet your extensive creative needs.

【High Quality】Our adhesive vinyl is made of PVC material, the permanent vinyl is waterproof, oil proof, self-adhesive, very durable and easy to store. this PVC vinyl can last 5 years indoor and 4 years outdoor.

【Easy to Cut & Weed】The permanent vinyl is soft and pliable, which easy to cut with scissors or rotary cutters. The Moderate viscosity sticky back felt makes you smoother in weeding and transferring vinyl. Unlike other vinyl with peeling and bubbles, our adhesive vinyl will hold on tightly to any smooth surface.
【Great Service】our product provides lifetime warranty and 30 days free return product. Once you have any questions about our products, you can let us know, we will do our best to help you solve it.
description: Product Description: 1. It is suitable for smooth surfaces such as cups, mugs, laptops, bottles, glass, furniture, etc., and is a good choice for decorating themed parties. 2. It’s safe in operation and use of permanently adhesive vinyl rolls. When you use it to cut patterns, shapes, or text onto smooth surfaces such as mugs and glasses, everyone will be amazed by the incredible color of permanent Vinyl. Specification: Colour: Matte White Material: PVC Size: 12 inch x 5Ft Package Include: 1 roll of white Cricut Vinyl (12inch x 5 Ft)
